Chatify Windows Package
=======================

Files:
- clicord-server.exe
- clicord-client.exe
- start-server.bat
- start-client.bat

Quick Start:
1) Run start-server.bat
2) Run start-client.bat

Optional parameters:
- start-server.bat [host] [port]
- start-client.bat [host] [port]

Examples:
- start-server.bat 0.0.0.0 8765
- start-client.bat 127.0.0.1 8765
